report.summary: Sprint 59 + Day 15 publish cycle closed cleanly — production is healthy, all 6 API routes confirmed, /ecosystem and /courses 404 regression resolved, 375 pages live.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Build PASSING on Vercel — 4m 2s, no errors
TypeScript: 2 parse errors in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX syntax in .examples file) — non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors: true, but should be cleaned up
New pages committed and live: /ecosystem (78 dApp pages + hub), /courses (hub + all slugs), /badges
Critical regression fixed: /ecosystem and /courses were 404ing due to files never committed to git — resolved in commit 1b4a15e
Stargate JSX close-tag typo (</html1>) fixed — was causing page build exclusion
No broken breadcrumbs or missing metadata flagged on new pages

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes confirmed present and correctly configured
/api/fear-greed: 10min TTL, stale-while-revalidate=1200 — healthy
/api/prices: 60s TTL, fallback data present — healthy
/api/trending: 5min TTL, stale-while-revalidate=600 — healthy
/api/market-metrics: 60s TTL, multi-source aggregation — healthy
/api/market-dominance: 5min TTL, FALLBACK_DATA defined — healthy
/api/defi-yields: dynamic cache with CACHE_DURATION variable — healthy
No rate limit hits or stale/fallback triggers observed this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Production deployment 6eX2pwX5b: Status READY (deployed ~35min ago)
Source: main branch, commit d3bce36 — 'publish: Day 15 — promote 3 learn guides to production'
Build time 4m 2s on Standard machine (4 vCPU / 8 GB) — within normal range
3 build warnings (non-blocking): Next.js 16.1.6 webpack info (x2) + SWC lockfile missing deps
AMBER: Lockfile missing SWC dependencies — run `npm install` locally to auto-patch
No error spikes, no rollback needed, all deployment checks passing

sections.title: Project Manager Wrap-Up
items: Sprint 59 shipped: App Store v2 — 176 dApps, ecosystem tabs, trending + browse view
Day 15 publish: 3 learn guides promoted from queue to production
Critical fix shipped: ecosystem + courses routes were 404ing in production — now resolved
375 total published pages live on degen0x.com
Carry-over for next cycle: patch SWC lockfile warning (run npm install locally), clean up structured-data.examples.ts TS errors
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention
